# criblio_lakehouse_dataset_connection (Resource)

LakehouseDatasetConnection Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "criblio_lakehouse_dataset_connection" "my_lakehousedatasetconnection" {
  lake_dataset_id = "web-logs"
  lakehouse_id    = "lakehouse-01"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tools/codegen -->
## Schema

### Required

- `lake_dataset_id` (String) The ID of the dataset within the lakehouse
- `lakehouse_id` (String) The ID of the lakehouse

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = criblio_lakehouse_dataset_connection.my_criblio_lakehouse_dataset_connection
  id = jsonencode({
    lake_dataset_id = "web-logs"
    lakehouse_id = "lakehouse-01"
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import criblio_lakehouse_dataset_connection.my_criblio_lakehouse_dataset_connection '{"lake_dataset_id": "web-logs", "lakehouse_id": "lakehouse-01"}'
```
